experience.title: Senior Vice President – Chief Information Officer, Shared Services and Infrastructure
bullets: Provides executive leadership for shared services and infrastructure technology across USAA.
Builds on prior enterprise architecture leadership to align platform direction, resilience, and delivery execution across the enterprise.
Continues a focus on secure operations, recoverability, and large-scale modernization in a regulated environment.

experience.title: Vice President – Enterprise Architecture
bullets: Leads enterprise technology strategy and architecture across USAA, aligning technical direction with business goals across all divisions.
Oversees over 100 technical architects and 10 executive fellows.
Owns the SRE Center of Excellence and advanced application routing initiatives.

experience.title: Vice President – CIO (Interim), Property & Casualty Company
bullets: Served as CIO for the $20B Property & Casualty division.
Managed a $700M technology budget and a 1,200-person organization.
Launched a multi-year transformation program over $1B to modernize core P&C systems.

experience.title: Assistant Vice President – Property & Casualty IT
bullets: Primary IT liaison to the P&C President, improving customer-focused transformation.
Established a strategic governance model for technology delivery.
Drove stronger business alignment across teams and priorities.

experience.title: Assistant Vice President – Quality Assurance
bullets: Restructured the Testing Center of Excellence for a $750M software portfolio.
Reduced testing costs by $9M and 200 FTE.
Raised delivery quality across enterprise software programs.

experience.title: Assistant Vice President – Distributed Systems & Systems Management
bullets: Consolidated distributed platforms and expanded data center virtualization from 40% to 80%.
Increased infrastructure capacity by 350% without cost increase.

experience.title: Assistant Vice President – Availability Assurance
bullets: Improved systems reliability and operational readiness during periods of rapid organizational growth.
Built support practices focused on stability and recoverability.

experience.title: Director, Standards & Architecture / Manager, Infrastructure Applications
bullets: Led standards and architecture work for infrastructure applications.
Supported enterprise modernization initiatives for operational teams.

experience.title: Global Director, Standards & Architecture
bullets: Directed global standards and architectural work.
Supported scalable global systems modernization.

experience.title: Senior Technical Consultant
bullets: Provided technical consulting across enterprise initiatives in software and infrastructure domains.

education.school: Texas A&M University, College Station, TX
